chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ الْمُتَزَوَّجَةِ الْمُدْرِكَةِ وَ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – Inheritance of the married mature woman and he (her husband) not having copulated with her yet

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/196)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/196)
text: الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا قَالَ لَهَا نِصْفُ الصَّدَاقِ وَ لَهَا الْمِيرَاثُ وَ عَلَيْهَا الْعِدَّةُ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazal Bin Shazaan, altogether from Safwan, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> regarding the widow whose husband had died from her without having slept with her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Half the dower and for her is the inheritance, and upon her is the waiting period’.
en.sarwar: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash ‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar and Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from all from Safwan from ‘Abd al- Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj from a man who has narrated the following: “About the case of a woman whose husband has died before going to bed with her, Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that she receives one-half of mahr (dower) and her share of inheritance and she must complete ‘Iddah (waiting period).’”
